page_metadata.biotools__summary: NpPred is a method developed for predicting nuclear proteins. This method has been developed on a non-redundant dataset consists of 2710 nuclear and 7662 non-nuclear proteins.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: NpPred is a method developed for predicting nuclear proteins. This method has been developed on a non-redundant dataset consists of 2710 nuclear and 7662 non-nuclear proteins.
